actionCenterClaimBody: Your unclaimed staking rewards already reach {amount}.
actionCenterClaimRedelegateBody: Available rewards already reach {amount} and can be recycled into staking.
actionCenterClosedProposalsBody: {count} proposal(s) closed recently. Top impact score: {score}/10.
actionCenterCrossWalletBody: One wallet still accounts for {pct}% of tracked value, despite multi-wallet loading.
actionCenterDegradedProtocolBody: {count} exposed protocol(s) are in a degraded state and still represent {pct}% of the portfolio.
actionCenterDetailEmpty: No targeted item is available for this action.
actionCenterDustBody: {count} positions are now small enough to count as dust.
actionCenterFallbackGovernanceBody: Use Proposals to confirm whether network governance needs your attention today.
actionCenterFallbackPortfolioBody: DarkSun does not see an urgent signal yet, but staking still deserves a quick check.
actionCenterFallbackRiskBody: Take a quick pass through Portfolio to validate concentration, liquidity and productive exposure.
actionCenterFragileStableBody: Stable exposure already represents {pct}% of the loaded portfolio.
actionCenterGovernanceBody: {count} open vote(s) could affect network context. Impact score: {score}/10.
actionCenterIdleAssetsBody: {count} asset(s) still leave {amount} idle in the wallet.
actionCenterIncreaseStakingIdleBody: About {amount} remains idle while the portfolio already tracks staking positions.
actionCenterIncreaseStakingIdleTitle: Decide what to do with idle capital
actionCenterLiquidityRiskBody: Liquidity and farming represent {pct}% of the portfolio while weighted APR stays near {apr}%.
actionCenterLowProductiveBody: {amount} remains deployed with limited weighted yield near {apr}%.
actionCenterNftBody: Your dominant NFT collection accounts for {pct}% of estimated NFT exposure.
actionCenterProtocolBody: One protocol already represents {pct}% of your productive exposure.
actionCenterReadBeforeReallocatingBody: An active proposal carries an impact score of {score}/10 across staking, supply, or liquidity conditions.
actionCenterReduceValidatorFeeBody: A meaningful validator now charges about {commission}% commission on a significant staking share.
actionCenterRefreshWatchlistBody: DarkSun is now tracking {positions} positions or more across this wallet set, which is a good time to refocus what deserves attention.
actionCenterRiskBody: Your top 3 holdings represent {pct}% of the portfolio and risk score is now {score}/100.
actionCenterTrimVolatileBody: {symbol} now represents {pct}% of the loaded portfolio.
actionCenterValidatorBody: Your top validator already represents {pct}% of the staking tracked by DarkSun.
actionCenterVoteClosingBody: {count} vote(s) will close in about {hours} hour(s).
actionCenterVoteNowBody: {count} vote(s) are currently open in the context tracked by DarkSun.
actionCw20Body: Build liquid DeFi opportunities with staggered entries.
actionNftBody: Hold core NFT positions and selectively buy premium collections only.
actionWalletBody: Reduce concentration risk before adding fresh capital to the wallet.
adminAnalyticsModulesSub: Cumulative usage over the last 30 days.
adminAnalyticsNoChartData: No data yet for this chart.
adminAnalyticsStatus: Connect an admin wallet to load analytics.
adminAnalyticsSub: Track DarkSun adoption with internal privacy-friendly metrics stored in persistent files.
adminAnalyticsTimeoutsSub: Latest timeouts detected on the UI side.
adminDashboardOrderSub: This order is used as the default layout and as the reset baseline for users.
adminHelp: Read-only config. Use Reload after editing the JSON file.
adminModeMaintenanceHint: Locks the app for non-admin visitors with a maintenance screen.
adminModeNeedsAdmin: Connect a signed admin wallet to manage these modes.
adminModeSoonHint: Shows a pre-launch message while development is still in progress.
adminModeSub: Enable or disable launch modes for this app.
adminNavigationSub: Choose a configuration area, then refine its sections.
adminNavSub: Choose which sidebar menus are visible to users.
adminSaveDisabled: Save is disabled: edit config/runtime-config.json and restart backend.
adminSignalDescBurnPositiveMomentum: Opportunity when burn momentum improves and can support the segment narrative.
adminSignalDescCexOutflowCluster: Alert when outgoing flows toward CEX clusters become significant.
adminSignalDescCw20RotationVolumeFlow: Opportunity when DeFi rotation improves with favorable flow and volume.
adminSignalDescLiquidityStress: Alert when a liquidity stress scenario shows a marked deterioration.
adminSignalDescNetworkBondedStrength: Opportunity when network staking strength improves perceived stability.
adminSignalDescNftDiscountWindow: Opportunity when some NFT valuations appear discounted relative to the tracked context.
adminSignalDescPriceShock: Alert when the portfolio remains highly sensitive to a price shock on its dominant exposures.
adminSignalDescStakingAprVsRisk: Opportunity when staking yield remains attractive relative to overall risk.
adminSignalDescUstcLiquidityThinning: Alert when observable liquidity on stable or defensive exposures thins out and weakens exit conditions.
adminSignalDescValidatorConcentration: Alert when dependency on a small number of validators becomes too large.
adminSignalFormulaCw20RotationVolumeFlow: Score = inflow events x 18 + positive net exchange flow / 500000.
adminSignalFormulaStakingAprVsRisk: Score = APR delta x 60 + (100 - risk score) x 0.35.
adminSignalFormulaUstcLiquidityThinning: Score = DEX exposure % x 2 + intraday volume spike %.
adminSignalsCatalogSub: Review every possible signal that can surface in Top Risks Today and Top Opportunities.
adminSignalThresholdsOpportunity: High Conviction if score >= 75. Watchlist if score >= 45. Speculative otherwise.
adminSignalThresholdsRisk: High if score >= 75. Medium if score >= 45. Low otherwise.
adminSubtitle: Configure API sources for live Terra Classic data.
adminSuggestedActionBodyCw20Accumulate: The DeFi setup is intermediate ({score}): exposure can be built in stages, but without accelerating too quickly.
adminSuggestedActionBodyCw20BuyAdd: DeFi signals are constructive ({score}): rotation and momentum support gradual adds on the most liquid opportunities.
adminSuggestedActionBodyCw20Watch: The DeFi signal remains moderate ({score}): it is better to monitor flow and wait for confirmation before increasing exposure.
adminSuggestedActionBodyNftHoldSelective: The NFT segment remains actionable ({score}): hold core positions and only add to the strongest collections.
adminSuggestedActionBodyNftHoldWatch: The NFT signal is still mixed ({score}): keep current exposure and wait for better liquidity or price windows.
adminSuggestedActionBodyNftReduce: Illiquidity risk dominates ({score}): reduce the least liquid positions and stay very selective on this segment.
adminSuggestedActionBodyWalletAddCapital: The portfolio is relatively balanced ({score}): capital can be added gradually without materially increasing risk.
adminSuggestedActionBodyWalletRebalanceF: The portfolio is too concentrated ({score}): exposures should be rebalanced before adding fresh capital.
adminSuggestedActionBodyWalletRebalanceL: The portfolio remains usable but needs a light rebalance ({score}) across dominant positions.
adminSuggestedActionDescAccumulate: Intermediate advice to build exposure in stages without pushing too aggressively.
adminSuggestedActionDescAddCapital: Capital can be added when the portfolio remains relatively healthy and balanced.
adminSuggestedActionDescBuyAdd: Offensive advice when rotation, momentum, and aggregate risk signals become favorable on the DeFi sleeve.
adminSuggestedActionDescHoldSelectiveBuy: Keep core NFT positions and only add to the strongest collections.
adminSuggestedActionDescHoldWatch: Keep current exposure but wait for better liquidity or price windows.
adminSuggestedActionDescRebalanceFirst: Rebalance first before adding capital when portfolio concentration becomes too high.
adminSuggestedActionDescRebalanceLight: Moderate adjustment recommended when the portfolio remains usable but unbalanced.
adminSuggestedActionDescReduce: Reduce NFT exposure when illiquidity or specific risk becomes too elevated.
adminSuggestedActionDescWatch: Cautious advice when the DeFi setup remains too weak or not yet confirmed.
adminSuggestedActionFormulaCw20: Score = rotation opportunity x 0.58 + (100 - risk score) x 0.22 + DeFi allocation x 0.20.
adminSuggestedActionFormulaNft: Score = (100 - illiquidity risk) x 0.58 + NFT allocation x 0.20 + (100 - risk score) x 0.22.
adminSuggestedActionFormulaWallet: Score = risk score x 0.62 + top 3 holdings % x 0.20 + max(top validator %, top protocol %) x 0.18.
adminSuggestedActionsCatalogSub: Review every advice path that the dashboard can surface for DeFi, NFTs, and the overall wallet.
adminSuggestedActionThresholdsCw20: BUY / ADD if score >= 70. ACCUMULATE if score >= 45. WATCH otherwise.
adminSuggestedActionThresholdsNft: HOLD / SELECTIVE BUY if score >= 65. HOLD / WATCH if score >= 40. REDUCE otherwise.
adminSuggestedActionThresholdsWallet: REBALANCE FIRST if score >= 70. LIGHT REBALANCE if score >= 45. ADD CAPITAL otherwise.
adminUiStateLoadFailed: Failed to load global UI state: {error}
alertsAnomalyHelp: Synthetic score for recent anomalies detected in flows and volume. Higher means the environment deserves more caution.
alertsMarketStateHelp: Summary of the market regime for the active chain in the portfolio context: constructive, mixed, or risk-off.
alertsOpenHelp: Total count of active alerts derived from the loaded portfolio: detected risks, anomalies, and defensive market context.
alertsRiskBiasHelp: Global risk bias calculated from the loaded portfolio using concentration, stress tests, and counterparty dependence.
alphaConnectAdminToConfirm: Connect an admin wallet to confirm Alpha registrations.
alphaConnectAdminToLoad: Connect an admin wallet to load Alpha registrations.
anomalyLpOutflowHelp: Alert triggered when productive DeFi exposure shows signs of outflow or liquidity deterioration relevant to the loaded portfolio.
anomalySellPressureHelp: Synthetic readout of recent sell pressure.
anomalyStatusHelp: Global anomaly block status based on currently active alerts.
anomalyVolumeSpikeHelp: Intraday volume variation on the tracked market.
authOnlyWalletModalStatus: Use Keplr or Galaxy Station to continue.
authOnlyWalletModalSub: Choose a wallet extension to sign the connection.
bundledSoonSub: Aggregate multiple wallets into one combined investor view.
cachedDataLoaded: Local cache shown ({time}), live sync in progress...
cacheFallbackUsed: Using local cache ({time}) due to network error.
chainBondedHelp: Share of native supply currently bonded on the active chain. A very low ratio often weakens security, while a healthier ratio generally supports the network better.
chainHealthSelectAriaLabel: Select the blockchain for the chain health widget
chainPriceHelp: Spot price observed for the active chain's native asset tracked by this portfolio. In multi-chain mode, this card follows the chain currently in focus.
chainProposalsHelp: Number of open proposals / votes to monitor on the active chain. Higher means more governance activity to track.
chainValidatorsHelp: Number of active validators on the displayed chain. A broader validator set generally improves network resilience.
dashboardBarConcentrationHelp:
Based on the top 3 positions and the main exposure weight.

To improve this score: spread capital more evenly and avoid one asset or protocol dominating the portfolio.
dashboardBarIlliquidityHelp:
Based on NFT weight, LP/farming exposure, and some concentration.

To improve this score: reduce hard-to-exit positions and favor assets or markets with deeper liquidity.
dashboardBarRotationHelp:
More deployable exposure outside the dominant position.

To improve this score: trim the dominant allocation and build more quality secondary liquid exposure.
dashboardBarYieldHelp:
Based on staking, liquidity, and productive farming exposure.

To improve this score: increase durable productive exposure with consistent net yield and controlled risk.
dashboardCustomizeLocked: User customization is disabled by admin settings.
dashboardCustomizeSaved: Dashboard preferences saved in this session.
dashboardCustomizeSub: Show, hide, and reorder the dashboard widgets for this user session.
dashboardDragHint: Drag and drop widgets directly inside the dashboard.
dashboardHelpActionCw20: Suggested DeFi action derived from momentum, liquidity and aggregate risk signals.
dashboardHelpActionNfts: Suggested NFT action derived from floor, liquidity, concentration and relative discount indicators.
dashboardHelpActionWallet: Suggested whole-wallet action based on concentration, exposure balance and overall risk score.
dashboardHelpAlertsCenter: Summary of active alerts derived from detected anomalies, current risk load and market context.
dashboardHelpAllocationSnapshot: Snapshot of the current portfolio allocation calculated from aggregated USD values across broad exposure categories.
dashboardHelpAnomalyAlerts: Alerts triggered by unusual signals relevant to the portfolio, such as DeFi outflows, volume spikes or rising risk pressure.
dashboardHelpChainHealth: Summary of the active chain state based on native-asset price, bonded ratio, validator count and active proposals.
dashboardHelpCounterpartyMap: Dependency measure across major portfolio counterparties, including DEXs, dominant validators and key protocols.
dashboardHelpExchangeFlows: Readout of net exchange-flow pressure and market activity on the active chain, weighted by the loaded portfolio.
dashboardHelpGovernanceImpact: Estimated governance and network impact on staking yield, supply pressure and monetary pressure.
dashboardHelpGovernanceRadar: Condensed governance view across held chains using open votes, estimated impact, supply pressure and monetary bias.
dashboardHelpMonetaryProtocols: Combined readout of tracked monetary protocols and observed on-chain uses for liquid portfolio assets, without personalized advice.
dashboardHelpNetExposure: Net portfolio exposure split between wallet assets, staking, productive DeFi, and NFT exposures.
dashboardHelpOnChainUses: Fact-based readout of observed on-chain uses for liquid assets detected in the portfolio, without personalized advice.
dashboardHelpOpportunityVsRisk: Heuristic comparison between opportunity and risk signals across rotation, concentration, yield, and liquidity segments.
dashboardHelpPnl24h: Estimated 24h portfolio change derived from tracked asset price moves over the last day.
dashboardHelpRiskConcentration: Concentration indicator based mainly on the combined weight of the portfolio's largest positions, especially the top three.
dashboardHelpRiskGauge: Synthetic risk gauge derived from concentration, stress scenarios and counterparty dependency.
dashboardHelpRiskScore: DarkSun global risk score out of 100, derived from concentration, stress tests and dependencies on validators, DEXs and protocols.
dashboardHelpStressTest: Scenario impact estimate for the portfolio under price shock, liquidity shock and validator failure assumptions.
dashboardHelpTopOpportunities: Selection of the strongest opportunities based on yield, momentum, rotation and discount signals.
dashboardHelpTopRisks: Selection of the most important risks detected by DarkSun from concentration, liquidity and flow signals.
dashboardHelpTotalValue: Sum of aggregated USD portfolio value based on tracked exposures and available pricing feeds.
dashboardHelpValidatorIntel: Summary of validator and staking metrics such as median uptime, fees, concentration and allocation guidance.
dashboardHelpWhaleTracking: Monitoring of large-holder activity on the active chain, weighted by how much that chain matters inside the loaded portfolio.
dashboardHelpYieldIntelligence: Yield readout based on staking-yield delta, staking support, validator fee range and allocation guidance.
dashboardReadingContextualRisk: Contextual = read with the rest of the risk
dashboardReadingDefensiveCautious: More defensive = more cautious, not better
dashboardReadingHigherBetterUntilPoint: Higher = generally better up to a point
dashboardReadingHigherYieldSupport: Higher = more of the portfolio supports staking yield
dashboardReadingMoreIntenseActivity: More intense = more activity to monitor
debtDesc: No indexed debt positions on Terra Classic yet.
demoBar: Demo Mode - Click to connect a wallet
demoBarBackendDegraded: Backend services are degraded. Some views may temporarily fall back to cached data.
demoBarSoon: SOON mode active - Private build before public launch
depDexExposureHelp:
Share of the portfolio dependent on DEXs through liquidity and farming exposure.

To improve this score: avoid letting LP/farming dominate the portfolio.
depProtocolConcentrationHelp:
Weight of the dominant protocol across liquidity and farming positions.

To improve this score: avoid one protocol concentrating most productive exposure.
depTopValidatorHelp:
Weight of the main validator within the portfolio's total staking exposure.

To improve this score: split staking across several strong validators.
donateClosed: This proposal is closed and no longer accepts donations.
donateEmpty: No community proposal to fund yet.
donateGoalReached: This proposal has already reached its funding target.
donateModalSub: Review the proposal details and choose your currency.
donateNeedWallet: Connect a Keplr wallet to donate.
donateOnchainNote: Donations are sent on-chain from your wallet.
donateRequiresKeplr: On-chain donation requires an active Keplr wallet.
donateSubtitle: Community support for the Terra Classic ecosystem
donateSyncFailed: On-chain transaction succeeded (Tx: {txHash}) but local sync failed: {error}
donateWalletOnlyKeplr: Only Keplr wallets can sign on-chain donations.
donateWalletSelectRequired: Select a connected Keplr wallet to continue.
donateWalletSub: Select the wallet that should sign this donation.
ecosystemNoResults: No network or protocol matches your search.
ecosystemSubtitle: Cosmos-oriented view for Terra Classic context
enterTerraAddress: Please enter a Terra Classic address.
exchangeOutflowHelp: Estimated net exchange-flow relevance for the active chain, weighted by the portfolio's actual chain exposure.
farmingDesc: Reward tokens, lock periods and effective APY by protocol.
farmingNoData: No yield farming positions for active wallets.
governanceAprDeltaHelp: Estimated change in staking yield under the current governance and network backdrop.
governanceBurnDeltaHelp: Change in supply-reduction or scarcity pressure on the active chain. A positive delta is generally more constructive.
governanceImpactScoreHelp: Measures the potential importance of governance and network policy decisions for the tracked portfolio.
governanceInflationHelp: Synthetic readout of network monetary pressure on the active chain.
govRadarActiveHelp: Number of open votes / proposals to monitor on the active chain. This is a monitoring load, not a quality score.
govRadarBurnHelp: Change in supply-reduction pressure on the active chain. A positive delta is generally more constructive.
govRadarImpactHelp: Measures the potential importance of governance and network policy decisions for the tracked portfolio.
govRadarInflationHelp: Qualitative readout of network monetary pressure. Lower or neutral pressure is generally preferable.
importNoValidWallets: No valid Terra Classic address found in file.
invalidTerraAddress: Invalid Terra Classic address format. Expected terra1...
keplrNotDetected: Keplr not detected. Opening install page...
lpAprHelp: Estimated annualized APR since local position baseline (value change). This is not yet a pure on-chain fee/reward APR.
lpDesc: Pool exposure, impermanent loss and fee yield breakdown.
lpIlHelp: Theoretical IL computed from local baseline, based on the pair assets price-ratio change.
lpNoData: No liquidity pool positions for active wallets.
luncExplorerDesc: Market cap, volume, burns, staking ratio
mainPortfolioSub: Uses active wallet for dashboard and portfolio views.
maintenanceGateBody: The app is temporarily unavailable while updates are being deployed.
managePortfolioNote: Create and manage portfolio groups in this browser session.
manageSub: Organize wallets in your browser session. No server-side account storage.
monetaryProtocolsEmpty: No tracked monetary protocols for this scope.
networksMenuNote: Terra Classic remains the core focus while Cosmos support is added progressively.
nftDesc: Floor trend, collection concentration and liquidity signals.
nonCustodial: Non-custodial. You keep full control of your keys.
noPortfolioYetDesc: Create a portfolio to organize wallets.
notificationsLoadFailed: Unable to load articles right now.
onChainUsesEmpty: No tracked on-chain uses for liquid assets in this scope.
onChainUsesSource: Liquid balances + DarkSun tracked protocol facts
oppNftDiscount: Discount window on selected NFT floor
oppStakingApr: LUNC staking APR improving vs risk
portfolioFastSnapshotLoaded: Fast snapshot loaded, enriching in the background...
proposalAdminReleaseNoFunds: No releasable funds found. Syncing status only.
proposalDetailsPlaceholder: What should be built? Why does it matter? Add links if needed.
proposalFundingConnectWallet: Connect a signing wallet to verify your balance.
proposalFundingEnough: Wallet balance looks sufficient for the submit fee.
proposalFundingUnavailable: Wallet balance could not be verified. You can still try to submit.
proposalPublicNote: Community proposals are public and tracked on this instance.
proposalSubmitBackend404: Endpoint not found (404). Active backend is outdated. Restart/deploy backend with /api/community-proposals.
proposalSubmitEscrowFailed: Proposal saved but escrow transaction failed: {error}
proposalSubmitNeedWallet: Connect a wallet to submit a proposal.
proposalSubmitRequiresKeplr: On-chain proposal submission requires an active supported wallet.
proposalTargetAmountHint: Auto-adjusted from category. This value is informational only.
proposalViewOnlyNote: Read-only: donations are available only for community proposals.
proposalWalletModalStatus: Use a supported wallet extension to continue.
proposalWalletModalSub: Choose a wallet extension to sign the on-chain submission.
proposalWalletSummaryHint: This wallet will be used for the on-chain signature.
riskUstcLiq: Stable liquidity thinning on active exposures
settingsSaved: Preferences are saved in your browser session.
settingsSubtitle: Customize language, currency, and action visibility for your session.
signalNftDiscountWindow: Discount window on selected NFT floors
soonGateBody: DarkSun is polishing the last details before public launch.
stakingAprHelp: Estimated net APR per validator: annualized network inflation / bonded ratio, then validator commission deduction. Indicative value.
stakingDesc: Top validators, rewards and APR details will appear here.
stakingNoData: No staking delegations found for connected wallets.
stationNotDetected: Galaxy Station not detected. Opening docs...
stationSignatureUnsupported: Galaxy Station signing is not available in this browser.
stressLiquidityShockHelp:
Measures the likely impact of deteriorating liquidity on LP, farming and less liquid segments.

To improve this score: trim positions that are harder to exit quickly.
stressPriceShockHelp:
Estimates the potential portfolio drawdown if dominant exposures suffer a 20% price shock.

To improve this score: reduce concentration in the most sensitive assets.
stressValidatorFailureHelp:
Measures how sensitive the portfolio is to a failure of the main validator or to overly concentrated staking.

To improve this score: spread delegations across more validators.
submitCommunityProposalFlowNote: When a proposal reaches target funding, DarkSun reviews it. If approved, funds are kept by the DarkSun team. If rejected, contributors are automatically refunded.
submitCommunityProposalSub: Describe the feature or fix the community can fund.
tokenExplorerSubtitle: Multi-chain token research, liquidity and market signals
ustcMovementHelp: Synthetic readout of market activity on the active chain, interpreted in the context of the loaded portfolio.
validatorCentralizationHelp: Readout of how concentrated staking remains across a few dominant validators.
validatorCommissionHelp: Commission range observed across the validators retained in the analysis.
validatorDelegationHelp: Operational delegation guidance based on current balance and concentration.
validatorUptimeHelp: Observed median uptime across tracked validators.
walletModalTrack: Or track a Terra Classic address
walletSignaturePrompt: Please sign the connection message in your wallet.
walletSignatureRequired: Wallet connection signature was rejected or failed.
whaleInflowsHelp: Count of large observed inflows on the active chain, weighted by how much that chain matters inside the loaded portfolio.
whaleOutflowsHelp: Count of meaningful observed outflows on the active chain, weighted by how much that chain matters inside the loaded portfolio.
yieldAprHelp: Change in the portfolio's weighted staking yield between now and about 24 hours ago. In multi-chain mode, the calculation is aggregated across the validators actually used.
yieldBondedHelp: Actual share of the loaded portfolio currently allocated to productive staking. This card is already calculated from the loaded portfolio.
yieldCommissionHelp: Commission range observed on the validators actually used by the portfolio or, if unavailable, from the active chain validator snapshot.
yieldDelegationHelp: Delegation guidance based on how concentrated the wallet is across validators. It turns defensive when too much stake sits on too few validators.
notificationsFilteredEmpty: No content is currently visible in notifications with the active filters.
stationBridgeInitFailed: Galaxy Station Wallet Kit bridge did not initialize.
stationBridgeLoadFailed: Failed to load Galaxy Station Wallet Kit bridge.
stationWalletAddressMissing: No wallet address returned by Galaxy Station.
adminUiStateRateLimited: Admin UI state is temporarily rate-limited.
adminUiStateRateLimitedStatus: Admin UI state is temporarily rate-limited.
adminChallengeRateLimitedStatus: Admin signature challenge is temporarily rate-limited.
adminWalletMismatch: Active signing wallet does not match admin wallet.
adminConfigReadOnly: Admin config is read-only. Update config/runtime-config.json and restart backend.
tokenExplorerScopeLoading: Loading tokens from the current DarkSun wallet or portfolio...
tokenExplorerScopeLoaded: Showing only tokens currently present in the loaded DarkSun wallet or portfolio.
tokenExplorerScopeEmpty: Load a DarkSun wallet or portfolio to show only currently held tokens here.
adminAlphaSub: Review pre-registered wallets, verify registration codes, and confirm access manually.
adminAlphaTableEmpty: Load the admin panel to review Alpha registrations.
adminAnalyticsConnectReason: Connect an admin wallet to load analytics.
adminAnalyticsSignedWalletRequired: This admin area currently requires the active signed Keplr admin wallet.
adminAnalyticsBackendMissing: Analytics dashboard is not available on this backend yet.
adminAnalyticsRateLimited: Analytics dashboard is rate-limited for a few minutes.
adminAnalyticsSignedKeplrRequired: Admin analytics currently require a signed Keplr admin wallet.
adminAnalyticsRebuildNeed: Connect an admin wallet to rebuild analytics.
adminDataStatusEmpty: Load config to edit API sources.
seoDashboardDescription: Track Terra Classic wallets, staking rewards, governance activity, and liquidity positions from one DarkSun dashboard.
seoDashboardKeywords: DarkSun, Terra Classic, LUNC dashboard, crypto portfolio tracker, staking rewards, governance
seoPortfolioDescription: Analyze Terra Classic wallet balances, staking positions, liquidity, farming, and NFTs from the DarkSun portfolio page.
seoPortfolioKeywords: Terra Classic portfolio, LUNC wallet tracker, staking portfolio, liquidity positions, NFT holdings
seoProposalsDescription: Follow Terra Classic governance proposals, community initiatives, and funding progress from the DarkSun proposals hub.
seoProposalsKeywords: Terra Classic proposals, LUNC governance, community proposals, on-chain governance, DarkSun
seoTokenExplorerDescription: Research Terra Classic and tracked ecosystem tokens with pricing, liquidity signals, and portfolio exposure from DarkSun.
seoTokenExplorerKeywords: token explorer, Terra Classic tokens, LUNC ecosystem, crypto liquidity, token research, DarkSun
seoEcosystemDescription: Browse the Terra Classic ecosystem, protocols, categories, and network coverage supported by DarkSun.
seoEcosystemKeywords: Terra Classic ecosystem, protocols, DeFi, LUNC apps, blockchain ecosystem, DarkSun
seoAdminDescription: Manage DarkSun platform modes, navigation, and widget visibility for the Terra Classic application.
seoAdminKeywords: DarkSun admin, Terra Classic admin, platform configuration, widget visibility
actionCenterClaimRecommendation: Open staking and check rewards, validator split, and claimable balance.
actionCenterClaimRedelegateRecommendatio: Open staking, compare validators, then decide whether to compound into your current split.
actionCenterValidatorRecommendation: Compare validators and spread delegations before adding more staking size.
actionCenterReduceValidatorFeeRecommenda: Open staking and compare validator commission, APR, and concentration before adding more stake.
actionCenterIncreaseStakingIdleRecommend: Open staking and compare whether part of the idle balance deserves delegation instead of staying dormant.
actionCenterGovernanceRecommendation: Open Proposals and review in-progress items before making allocation changes.
actionCenterVoteNowRecommendation: Open Proposals and decide whether one of the active votes needs your review or participation now.
actionCenterVoteClosingRecommendation: Open Proposals and prioritize the votes with the nearest deadline first.
actionCenterClosedProposalsRecommendatio: Open Proposals and scan recently solved items before adjusting allocation assumptions.
actionCenterProtocolRecommendation: Open Portfolio and confirm whether that protocol deserves to remain your largest productive exposure.
actionCenterDegradedProtocolRecommendati: Open liquidity and farming views, then decide whether to reduce, monitor, or keep the exposure.
actionCenterLiquidityRiskRecommendation: Open liquidity and farming to check whether risk still matches the current reward profile.
actionCenterLowProductiveRecommendation: Open liquidity and farming to compare whether that capital still deserves to stay deployed there.
actionCenterRiskRecommendation: Open Portfolio and check whether recent gains have pushed allocation too far into a few positions.
actionCenterFragileStableRecommendation: Open wallet balances and confirm whether stable exposure still matches your short-term risk plan.
actionCenterTrimVolatileRecommendation: Open wallet balances and decide whether this position size still matches your conviction and risk budget.
actionCenterDustRecommendation: Open wallet balances and review whether some micro-positions can be cleaned up or ignored intentionally.
actionCenterIdleAssetsRecommendation: Open Portfolio and check which balances should stay liquid versus move into staking or protocol opportunities.
actionCenterCrossWalletRecommendation: Open Portfolio and compare wallet slices before assuming risk is split across addresses.
actionCenterReadBeforeReallocatingRecomm: Open Proposals and read the highest-impact item before changing allocation or compounding decisions.
actionCenterRefreshWatchlistRecommendati: Use Dashboard, Portfolio, and Proposals to decide what deserves active monitoring this week.
actionCenterNftRecommendation: Open NFTs and confirm whether collection concentration still matches your current thesis.
